description: Perform 3 types of hypothesis tests (t-test, chi-square, ANOVA) on given datasets and output results in JSON and Excel.

evaluators.description: Check that hypothesis_tests.json is valid JSON
Check that JSON has t_test, chi_square, and anova sections
Check that t-test treatment group mean is approximately 26.28
Check that t-test p-value is less than 0.05 (significant)
Check that ANOVA p-value is less than 0.05 (significant)
